documentation.description:
Lightweight supervisor for restartable runtime jobs.

A supervisor records spawned child work, detects faulted handles, and can
restart them according to policy. It deliberately uses Aion.Runtime instead
of creating a private worker pool.

simple_types.name: Supervisor
simple_types.code: type Supervisor (Max_Children : Positive) is limited private;

record_types.name: Supervisor_Config
Supervisor_Stats

access_types.name: Runtime_Access
access_types.code: type Runtime_Access is access all Aion.Runtime.Runtime_Handle;

subprograms.name: Cancel_All
subprograms.code:
function Cancel_All
  (Item   : in out Supervisor;
   Reason : String := "supervisor cancelled")
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Initialize
Run_Until_Stable
subprograms.code:
function Run_Until_Stable
  (Item    : in out Supervisor;
   Timeout : Aion.Types.Milliseconds := 0)
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Spawn
Tick
subprograms.code:
function Tick
  (Item : in out Supervisor) return Operation_Results.Result_Type
